Session_38a-2_L2052.rationale: wta disabled at S97 (2026-05-11) per bot/config.py:239 MOMENTUM_DISABLED_SPORTS. Re-enable requires an explicit future operator session, not automatic on cohort growth. No re-enable signal in S98-S146. Trigger axis closed.
Session_38a-2_L2052.trigger_text_snippet: Re-evaluate wta-main when settled wta CFs reach n=80 OR mean CLV crosses positive territory.

Session_38a-2_L2067.rationale: Lever (per-sport MOMENTUM_LEADER_MIN for WTA) is moot while parent sport wta is disabled (S97). Tuning a per-sport threshold on a disabled sport produces no live behavior change. Classifier at tools/glint_status.py:1008 collapses this entry to the wta-main TRIGGERED branch because the trigger text references the Apr 30 'settled wta CFs reach' trigger as parent context, so the dashboard detail matches L2052; the underlying lever is still distinct. Retired alongside L2052; re-actionable only if wta is explicitly re-enabled.
Session_38a-2_L2067.trigger_text_snippet: May 1 update: re-evaluate per-sport MOMENTUM_LEADER_MIN for WTA if no_leader/wta sub-cohort reaches n=30 with sustained +mean CLV at 14d.

Session_41_L2381.rationale: TP/SL sweep ruled out via Pattern C in S41 (n=39) and confirmed in S129 at larger N (Pattern C). Adjacent axes also closed: sizing (S130 Pattern C), scoring (S131 Outcome B, ATP-vs-IPL timing artifact not TP/SL), sport-scope (S132 Outcome B, N-thin per-sport). S134 cross-AI synthesis named the structural gap: live_momentum lacks a fair-value model, so parameter tuning cannot answer 'is this a good trade?' Substrate work, not TP/SL tuning, is the unblock path. Cohort growth past n=60 does not unlock a new tuning axis.
Session_41_L2381.trigger_text_snippet: Re-investigate Session 41 when EITHER post-Apr-23 settled live_momentum cohort >= 60 trades AND/OR SL-axis-flat finding ceases to hold.

Session_102_L5461.rationale: L5461 is S102's acknowledgment that S41's trigger fired at n=66 (>=60 threshold). S102 queued the re-investigation as a Session 103+ candidate; the actual re-investigation (S129) returned Pattern C, closing the trigger's prompted axis. L5461 inherits S41 L2381's closure. No remaining action.
Session_102_L5461.trigger_text_snippet: S41's watch-list trigger fired (post-Apr-23 live_momentum n=66). Queued as Session 103+ candidate; closed by S129 Pattern C re-run.
